title: I Pick Up Lot of Attributes Episode 1 Subtitle
description:
Eng

Feng Xia, a game player who travels through time and space. With the strengths, attributes, and strategies learned from the games he used to play before, he can defeat his enemies and gain their Attributes. Moreover, he also met all kinds of beauties along the wayâ¦ His enemy laughed: âMy martial arts are invincible!â Feng Xia had just defeated them and absorbed their Light Attributes. "Of course. But sorry, this is my martial art now!â

Indo

Feng Xia, pemain game yang melakukan perjalanan melalui ruang dan waktu. Dengan kekuatan, atribut, dan strategi yang dipelajari dari game yang biasa dia mainkan sebelumnya, dia dapat mengalahkan musuhnya dan mendapatkan Atribut mereka. Selain itu, dia juga bertemu dengan semua jenis wanita cantik di sepanjang jalan â¦ Musuhnya tertawa: âSeni bela dirikutidak terkalahkan!â Feng Xia baru saja mengalahkan mereka dan menyerap Atribut Cahaya mereka. âMemang. Tapi maaf, ini seni bela dirikusekarang!â
